title: AT Fields
wikitext:
[]: A.T Fields             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Jan 02, 2008 5:42 am What makes it impenetrable? What makes it orange? What makes it so much like a boundary that can deflect or absorb any projectile? What makes it tick? And tell me if there's any other thread on this around here beforehand prior to locking this.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 6:05 am i think i quetioned the ATF once a long time ago

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 02, 2008 12:37 pm http://evageeks.org/FGP/A.T._Field

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Jan 02, 2008 1:03 pm It's the soul and a plot device. /endofthread

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Jan 02, 2008 2:35 pm Ornette wrote: http://evageeks.org/FGP/A.T._Field

[]:             Quote Post by bap_120790 » Wed Jan 02, 2008 3:05 pm But what does that tell about it being orange? Oh, nevermind. It's probably just an artistic touch.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Jan 02, 2008 7:30 pm What makes it all "impregnable" I guess?

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Wed Jan 02, 2008 8:33 pm I remember reading a post where someone actually gave an energy value to AT Fields...I'm not sure where though.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jan 02, 2008 8:36 pm "Eva-01's A.T. Field power level! It's... it's...!" You know the rest.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Thu Jan 03, 2008 5:01 pm What kind of energy is it anyway? What is it made of? My guess right now, would be ectoplasm, or something like it. We know what it is (even though it might not exist), but don't know what it is made of. I just thought this because it got something to do with the soul, so.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Jan 03, 2008 5:36 pm There was this guy on another forum who argued that AT fields would be innefective against beam weapons like lasers since we can actually see light passing through the AT fields. Now the only time lasers have actually been used on angels is when Iruel hacked into nerv. Though arguably that might not count since Ireul could adapt to to anything that they through at it. The positron beam doesn't count since that isn't a laser but an antimatter weapon, though a beam would need to channel the positrons otherwise it would detonate on contact with the air. So what do youa ll think? Would a regular laser beam cannon be able to take out the angels?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Thu Jan 03, 2008 5:39 pm I have a feeling that AT field could be controlled as to what comes in and what gets deflected. If not, the hightened wave length would probably just make it impassable through the AT field, as only normal colour wavelength is allowed, at a certain power.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Fri Jan 04, 2008 9:40 am universalperson wrote: I remember reading a post where someone actually gave an energy value to AT Fields...I'm not sure where though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 04, 2008 9:46 am Where does ObsessiveMathsFreak come up with this stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Jan 04, 2008 12:49 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Where does ObsessiveMathsFreak come up with this stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Jan 04, 2008 4:46 pm The Imperialist wrote: What kind of energy is it anyway? What is it made of?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Jan 04, 2008 5:39 pm Therefore, AT field are not as partially permeable. Which means by its magnitude, the higher it is, the more things get blocked, including visible light. Does that also mean it could block 'sould' from coming through, even though it is not really a 'energy'? It may be the projection of the soul, but what is it made of? Ectoplasm, like I said before? Or something more conventional and easier to prove of its existance? Or just something made to exist for the convienience of the series?

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Jan 04, 2008 7:13 pm I think the ObssessiveMathsFreak might be able to explain this. Where is he anyway? Hmm...yes I think it's just how they call it, "plot device", so I think it's just how the animators wanted it to be.

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Fri Jan 04, 2008 7:26 pm I don't think an AT field can be logically explained. I also don't know if it is really a shield to keep things out, it may in fact be more accurate to say that it keeps things in, namely our souls in our bodies and our human form intact. I might try to explain an AT field in more spiritual terms... If we had to explain it scientifically, I would only say that it appears that it can react with mediums of the physical, mental and lightwave nature. Perhaps it is more like a controled radiation, such as electro magnetic radiation, which behaves both as a light wave and has some physical (or kinetic) energy.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jan 04, 2008 8:23 pm An A.T. Field does just what Anno sets it to do. In other words, plot device. But in all serious discussion, you don't need to completely cancel out all light to make it impermeable. You could simply phase shift the light, so that the incoming rays of light cancel each other out (Using the wave properties of light, which would have each ray as a series of little waves. The crest of one little wave and the trough of another cancel out.) Alternatively, you could use some of the surrounding matter to form a reflective layer. Those lasers were not very powerful, and they could be bounced off fairly easily even by a normal mirror, much less an Angel-generated A.T. Field.
